purpose: Direct-inference controlled benchmark on the strictly audited structured pathway-continuation v3 release. All stage-2 arms share one SFT and AE and use the same optimizer schedule; only the Hamiltonian losses differ.

dataset_profile.name: structured_pathway_continuation_v3_cap256
dataset_profile.source: canonical processed_graph relation/reaction records with stable graph, sink-view, record, and sample identity
dataset_profile.selection: seeded record candidate selection, family cap 256, organism/trajectory-length diversity, at most three prefix rows per train record, and one deterministic prefix per record per epoch
dataset_profile.core_eval: data/pathway_v3_cap256/test_pathway_continuation_v3.csv (held-out organisms and held-out five-digit KEGG pathway families)
dataset_profile.semantic_unit: ordered graph layers; canonical relation/reaction events inside one layer form an unordered set and never consume separate ODE time
dataset_profile.epoch_prefix_sampling: record-centric and seed/epoch deterministic; SFT emphasizes short continuation twice per four-record-epochs plus one middle and one long view, while HNN/FDHNN emphasizes long continuation twice plus one middle and one short view; validation prefixes remain fixed
dataset_profile.source_schema_note: v3 reconstructs sink-SCC views directly from all processed_graph structural events. It does not recover event boundaries from concatenated paragraphs and excludes phenotype from the core target.

sequence_budget.streaming_progress_artifact: direct.progress.jsonl (one gold/prediction audit record per completed sample)
sequence_budget.inference_batch_policy: Pinned because batch_size can change greedy floating-point trajectories; four-GPU speedup uses disjoint data shards instead.
sequence_budget.target_policy: Every assistant answer is a complete closed v3 JSON object. Rows over 8192 total tokens are excluded before training and counted in data_audit.json.

validation_policy.selection: explicit deterministic family-disjoint validation CSV reused by SFT, AE, and every stage-2 arm
validation_policy.reason: checkpoint selection is aligned with the unseen-pathway-family core test rather than in-family source holdout

artifact_scope: checkpoints/seeds/<seed>/... and runs/seeds/<seed>/...; within a seed all stage-2 arms reuse that seed's shared SFT and AE

a_dynamics.a1_hnn_orthogonal_poisson: Pure HNN with J=Q^T J0 Q, exactly skew, full-rank, and J^2=-I.
a_dynamics.a2_forced_damped_hnn: (J-rI) grad H + F(t), with isotropic positive damping and time-only force.

b_ae.b0_reconstruction_ae_shared: One shared frozen reconstruction AE; trained on answer tokens plus the final prompt anchor.

d_training_schedule.shared_prerequisite: Train stage-1 SFT and AE once.
d_training_schedule.d1_stage2_sft_control: Same stage-2 loop with every dynamics loss and dynamics LR set to zero.
d_training_schedule.d2_stage2_joint_dynamics: Jointly refine the same LoRA and the selected Hamiltonian dynamics.

c_inference.c0_direct_lora: Direct greedy LoRA generation. Dynamics is not loaded at generation time.

implemented.title: Shared stage-1 SFT and reconstruction AE prerequisites
implemented.granularity: token CE; AE answer states plus prompt anchor
implemented.training_coupling: four-GPU DDP SFT followed by one shared frozen-AE training run
implemented.notes: Run once per dataset revision and seed; every controlled stage-2 row reuses checkpoint_best from both stages.

implemented.title: Stage-1 shared SFT direct baseline
implemented.notes: Measures the stage-1 baseline; not the compute-matched dynamics control.

implemented.title: Compute-matched stage-2 SFT-only control
implemented.granularity: token CE; semantic-layer computations retained with zero auxiliary weights
implemented.middle_network: Hamiltonian branch computed but all dynamics weights and LR are zero
implemented.training_coupling: shared SFT/AE then the exact stage-2 schedule without an effective dynamics objective
implemented.notes: Primary attribution control for exp001/exp002; same rows, seed, epochs, optimizer loop, and validation split.
implemented.what_it_tests: Separates extra stage-2 SFT compute from dynamics regularization.

implemented.title: Pure HNN plus joint stage-2 LoRA and direct inference
implemented.granularity: graph-layer trajectory with same-layer event-set pooling
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = J grad H; J=Q^T J0 Q
implemented.training_coupling: shared SFT/AE then joint stage-2 LoRA plus HNN
implemented.inference_mode: direct greedy LoRA generation; HNN is a training regularizer
implemented.notes: Conservative Hamiltonian contrast under the same stage-2 schedule.
implemented.what_it_tests: Effect of conservative semantic-layer regularization beyond stage-2 SFT.

implemented.title: Forced/damped HNN plus joint stage-2 LoRA and direct inference
implemented.granularity: graph-layer trajectory with same-layer event-set pooling
implemented.middle_network: dz/dt = (J-rI) grad H + F(t); J=Q^T J0 Q, r>=0
implemented.training_coupling: shared SFT/AE then joint stage-2 LoRA plus forced/damped HNN
implemented.inference_mode: direct greedy LoRA generation; dynamics is a training regularizer
implemented.notes: Primary method row. Upstream pathway changes z0; there is no independent intervention input u.
implemented.what_it_tests: Whether isotropic dissipation and universal time forcing improve the pure HNN and stage-2 controls.

combinations.title: Graph-layer-by-graph-layer generation with a validated JSON layer-boundary controller
combinations.training_requirement: Reuse the graph-layer dynamics checkpoint only when one dynamics advance corresponds to one completed graph layer.
combinations.evaluation_requirement: Compare against direct greedy generation on biological validity, JSON validity, long-horizon error, and compute.

combinations.title: Token-by-token generation with separately trained token-resolution dynamics
combinations.evaluation_requirement: Compare against direct greedy and graph-layer generation on biological validity, JSON validity, long-horizon error, and compute.

combinations.title: Multiscale hybrid generation combining token and completed-layer controllers
combinations.evaluation_requirement: Ablate each controller and compare against direct greedy generation under matched decoding budgets.

combinations.title: PHNN only after an independently observed port/control variable is defined
Neural ODE with the same shared SFT/AE and semantic-layer targets
Complete-candidate LLM plus held-out-calibrated HNN diagnostic reranking
